name: Scale-Aware Attention for Scarce Neural Data: An RG-Flow Transformer on Sleep-EDF EEG
summary: arXiv:2607.11950v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Brain field potentials are scale-free: their power spectra follow a $1/f^{\beta}$ law whose aperiodic exponent $\beta$ tracks cortical state, and s...
description: arXiv:2607.11950v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Brain field potentials are scale-free: their power spectra follow a $1/f^{\beta}$ law whose aperiodic exponent $\beta$ tracks cortical state, and sleep depth in particular is a shift in $\beta$. We ask whether a transformer endowed with an explicit renormalization-group (RG) inductive bias -- the RG-Flow Transformer, which couples ordinary self-...
author: Dibakar Sigdel
